summary: Simplicity veto behavior is unchanged: a 🔴 from the simplicity role is tagged [simplicity veto] by mergeReviewFindings and forces FAIL via hasSimplicityVeto in run.mjs's multi-review path. This iteration addresses the architect's PASS-with-suggestions feedback by extracting the shared SIMPLICITY_VETO_TAG constant from synthesize.mjs and consuming it in flows.mjs to remove the duplicated literal. All 598 tests pass.
